gods.name: Ahri
gods.offers: Offers gold, XP, and reroll rewards.

stages.title: 4-7 Reward
values: Gain 2 gold, 2 XP, and 2 rerolls each round

stages.title: Stage 2
values: Reach 50 gold to gain component anvil + 4 gold
Field 6 non-unqiue traits to get a random emblem and a reforger

stages.title: Stage 3
values: Star up a unit to get 10 gold
Field 6 non-unqiue traits to get a random emblem and a reforger

stages.title: 4-7 Reward
values: Choose one of three trials to prove yourself to Aurelion Sol

gods.name: Ekko
gods.offers: Offers delayed rewards and special loot.

stages.title: 4-7 Reward
values: Gain the Anomaly item, which provides unique bonuses based on role

gods.name: Evelynn
gods.offers: Offers stronger rewards in exchange for Tactician health.

stages.title: 4-7 Reward
values: Your team gains 10% Durability. Lose an additional 1 health when you lose combat

stages.title: 4-7 Reward
values: Upgrade a random completed item to Radiant

stages.title: 4-7 Reward
values: Team gains 2 HP per missing Tactician health. +1 current and max health Tactician each round

stages.title: 4-7 Reward
values: After each player combat, roll a die. Gain rewards based on the result

gods.name: Varus
gods.offers: Offers champions, duplicators, and shop-based rewards.

stages.title: 4-7 Reward
values: Your team gains 10 health for each total star level in your army. Increase your 5 cost odds by 4%

stages.title: 4-7 Reward
values: Increase the power of Yasuo's hexes by 50%. If you only have 2 hexes, gain 12 gold.

effects.count:
(2)
Dark Stars create a black hole that consumes enemies at 10% max health.

effects.text: Dark Stars create a black hole that consumes enemies at 10% max health.
AND the strongest Dark Star unit goes supermassive, gaining 100% effectiveness from Dark Star, and creates 2 minor Black Holes.
All Dark Stars are supermassive. At level 10, CONSUME EVERYONE.

synergys.name: Meeple
synergys.description: Astronauts attract Meeps that empower Astronaut abilities in meepy ways. They also gain bonus Health.

effects.text: 4%, 400 Health. Create a Cloning Slot on your bench. Gain gold and a 1-star copy of the champion placed there when cloning completes.
6%, 1000 Health. SUMMON THE FOUR MEEPLORDS! Cloning time = Champion cost

effects.count:
(2)
6 seconds into combat, N.O.V.A. grant a power surge to allies based on champions.
effects.text:
(5)
Gain a Striker selector. The chosen N.O.V.A. activates their Strike during the power surge. Aatrox: Ally Damage 30% Shred and Sunders enemies / Caitlyn: Grant allies 20% Attack Speed / Akali: Allies gain Precision / Maokai: Allies heal 15% max Health / Kindred: Shield the strongest Tank for 800 / Emblem: Allies deal 10% stacking bonus true damage
6 seconds into combat, N.O.V.A. grant a power surge to allies based on champions.

Gain a Striker selector. The chosen N.O.V.A. activates their Strike during the power surge. Aatrox: Ally Damage 30% Shred and Sunders enemies / Caitlyn: Grant allies 20% Attack Speed / Akali: Allies gain Precision / Maokai: Allies heal 15% max Health / Kindred: Shield the strongest Tank for 800 / Emblem: Allies deal 10% stacking bonus true damage

effects.count:
(2)
Dealing damage spawns Swarmlings based on Primordian star level.
effects.text:
(3)
Spawn even more Swarmlings! Each round, gain a random 1 or 2-cost champion. 8% of damage taken contributes to damage dealt.
Dealing damage spawns Swarmlings based on Primordian star level.
Spawn even more Swarmlings! Each round, gain a random 1 or 2-cost champion. 8% of damage taken contributes to damage dealt.

synergys.name: Psionic
synergys.description: Gain Psionic items that can be equipped to any ally.

effects.text:
(4)
Gain the Psionic item 2, Psionic items gain extra effects on Psionic units
Gain the Psionic item 2, Psionic items gain extra effects on Psionic units

effects.count:
(1)
Groovians can enter the Groove. While in it, they gain Attack Speed and max Health Regen, increased per Groovian on your team.
effects.text:
(3)
All Groovians start combat in the Groove for 3 seconds.
Groovians can enter the Groove. While in it, they gain Attack Speed and max Health Regen, increased per Groovian on your team.
All Groovians start combat in the Groove for 3 seconds.
Each second spent in the Groove grants 3% stacking Attack Damage and Ability Power.

effects.count:
(2)
When you lose, gain free rerolls. When you win, store XP in a Temporal Core (scales with stage).

effects.text: When you lose, gain free rerolls. When you win, store XP in a Temporal Core (scales with stage).
AND Timebreakers gain an additional 50% Attack Speed

synergys.name: Commander (Sona)
synergys.description: Sona gives you a random Command Mod every 2 rounds which allows you to alter the way an ally behaves during combat. Command Mods last 2 player combats even if they are not equipped.

synergys.name: Galaxy Hunter (Zed)
synergys.description: Zed is obtained from the Invader Zed augment. While at least one clone is alive, Zed gains 40% bonus Attack Damage.

synergys.name: Oracle (Tahm Kench)
synergys.description: Every 3 rounds, Tahm Kench grants a reward!

synergys.name: Anima
synergys.description: After losing a player combat, gain 15 Tech, plus additional Tech equal to 5 times the length of your loss streak. Additionally, gain 2 Tech per Anima takedown. Each time Animas get 100 Tech, they prototype new Anima Weapons. You can take them, or save your Tech to get more powerful weapons next time.

effects.text:
(6)
Gain a loot Orb upon win
Gain a loot Orb upon win

synergys.name: Arbiter
synergys.description: Scribe a unique divine law, allowing you to choose an effect to apply to Arbiters when a chosen cause occurs.

effects.count:
(2)
Choose a cause and effect for your law

effects.text: Choose a cause and effect for your law

synergys.name: Bastion
synergys.description: Your team gains 12 Armor and Magic Resist. Bastions gain more, and the value doubles in the first 10 seconds of combat.

effects.text: 55 Armor & MR; Non-Bastions gain an additional 20 Armor & MR.

synergys.name: Brawler
synergys.description: Your team gains 7% Health. Brawlers gain more.

synergys.name: Challenger
synergys.description: Your team gains 10% Attack Speed. Challengers gain bonus Attack Speed. When their target dies, Challengers dash to a new target and increase their Attack Speed bonus by 50% for 2.50 seconds.

synergys.name: Channeler
synergys.description: Innate: Channelers gain 20% additional Mana from all sources. Your team gains Mana Regen, increased for Channelers.

synergys.name: Fateweaver
synergys.description: Innate: Fateweavers have Precision.

effects.count:
(2)
Chance effects on abilities are Lucky.
effects.text:
(4)
Gain 20% Crit Chance and 10% Crit Damage. Critical strikes are also Lucky.
Chance effects on abilities are Lucky.
Gain 20% Crit Chance and 10% Crit Damage. Critical strikes are also Lucky.

synergys.name: Marauder
synergys.description: Your team gains 5% Omnivamp. Marauders gain more Omnivamp, Attack Damage, and their Omnivamp overhealing is converted into Shield (up to 25% max Health.)

synergys.name: Mecha
synergys.description: Innate: Mecha units can transform into their Ultimate form, upgrading their ability and gaining 60% Health. Transformed Mechas take up two team slots and count twice for the Mecha trait.

effects.count:
(3)
Energy Cells: Mechas gain 20% AD & AP.
effects.text:
(4)
Overclocked Cells: Increased to 35% AD & AP.
Energy Cells: Mechas gain 20% AD & AP.
Overclocked Cells: Increased to 35% AD & AP.

synergys.name: Replicator
synergys.description: Replicator abilities occur a second time at reduced effectiveness.

synergys.name: Rogue
synergys.description: Rogues gain Attack Damage and Ability Power. The first time they fall below 50% health, they slip into shadows. Enemies targeting them are redirected to a nearby unit, preferring Tanks.

synergys.name: Shepherd
synergys.description: Shepherds summon the Bond of the Stars to aid them in battle.

effects.text: Bia and Bayin's bond grows deeper. Bia and Bayin's power are increased by the total star level of Shepherd.

synergys.name: Sniper
synergys.description: Snipers gain Damage Amp, increased against targets farther away.

synergys.name: Stargazer (The Altar)
synergys.description: Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. This game: The Altar.

effects.text: When ANY unit dies, they are sacrificed to the altar. Allies in empowered hexes gain 10% health and 15% attack speed. After 60 sacrifices, Stargazers in empowered hexes gain an additional 25% health and 40% attack speed. More hexes reveal at each player level

synergys.name: Stargazer (The Boar)
synergys.description: Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. This game: The Boar. Gain gold on win. Allies in empowered hexes gain 8% health, attack damage, and ability power. Stargazers gain more.

effects.count:
(3)
1 gold, 10% health, 18% attack damage and ability power
effects.text:
(4)
2 gold, 15% health, 25% attack damage and ability power
1 gold, 10% health, 18% attack damage and ability power
2 gold, 15% health, 25% attack damage and ability power
3 gold, 20% health, 33% attack damage and ability power
5 gold, 25% health, 40% attack damage and ability power. More hexes reveal at each player level

synergys.name: Stargazer (The Fountain)
synergys.description: Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. This game: The Fountain. Allies in empowered hexes gain 1 mana regen. Stargazers in empowered hexes gain more and heal the lowest Health ally with their abilities.

effects.text:
(5)
5 mana regen, 18% ability damage heal. More hexes reveal at each player level
5 mana regen, 18% ability damage heal. More hexes reveal at each player level

synergys.name: Stargazer (The Huntress)
synergys.description: Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. This game: The Huntress. Mark the highest Health enemies. Allies in empowered hexes gain 15% attack speed. Stargazers in empowered hexes gain more and heal for 10% of their max health when a marked enemy dies.

effects.text: 60% attack speed, 7 marks. More hexes reveal at each player level

synergys.name: Stargazer (The Medallion)
synergys.description: Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. This game: The Medallion.

effects.text: Allies in empowered hexes gain 15% damage amp, which increases by 3% for each 3 star on your team. More hexes reveal at each player level

synergys.name: Stargazer (The Mountain)
synergys.description: Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. This game: The Mountain. Every 5 player combat, gain a Stargazer emblem. Stargazers in empowered hexes gain various bonuses.

effects.text:
(4)
AND 15% attack damage and ability power
AND 15% attack damage and ability power
AND increase all other bonuses by 20%
The stars beckon all enemies. More hexes reveal at each player level

synergys.name: Stargazer (The Serpent)
synergys.description: Stargazers chart a different constellation every game. This game: The Serpent. Allies in empowered hexes gain 8% Durability. Stargazers in empowered hexes gain more and poison enemies, repeating a portion of damage dealt as magic damage over 3 seconds.

effects.text: 25% DR, 60% poison damage. More hexes reveal at each player level

synergys.name: Vanguard
synergys.description: Vanguards gain 5% Durability while Shielded. Combat start and 50% Health: Gain a max Health Shield for 10 seconds.

synergys.name: Voyager
synergys.description: Combat Start: Your Tanks and Fighters gain a Shield for 15 seconds. Your other allies gain Damage Amp. Voyagers gain double.

synergys.name: Arcana
synergys.description: Every 3 rounds, Tahm Kench grants a reward!

synergys.name: Bulwark (Shen)
synergys.description: Summon a placeable relic. At the start of combat, it grants adjacent allies a 18% max Health shield and 20% Attack Speed.

synergys.name: Dark Lady (Morgana)
synergys.description: Allies take 5% less damage from abilities, increased to 10% while Morgana is in Dark Form.

synergys.name: Divine Duelist (Fiora)
synergys.description: You heal for 15% of player damage you deal. Fiora always wins a one on one duel.

synergys.name: Doomer (Vex)
synergys.description: Combat Start: Mark all enemies with Doom. The first time enemies are damaged each combat, their Doom is consumed, stealing 8% Attack Damage and Ability Power from them and granting it to your strongest Vex.

synergys.name: Eradicator (Jhin)
synergys.description: Enemies have 14% less Armor and Magic Resist.

synergys.name: Factory New (Graves)
synergys.description: After participating in combat, open an armory to purchase a permanent upgrade for your strongest Graves. Every 3 upgrades, future upgrades will take an additional round.

synergys.name: Gun Goddess (Miss Fortune)
synergys.description: When you field Miss Fortune, choose between Channeler Mode, Challenger Mode, and Replicator Mode. Miss Fortune has a unique ability based on her mode and gains the associated trait.

synergys.name: Party Animal (Blitzcrank)
synergys.description: Once per combat, after falling below 45% percent Health, become untargetable and repair 15% max Health per second. Upon reaching full Health, or when no other allies remain, return to combat. If fully healed, for the rest of combat Blitzcrank is in The Groove and Party Crasher's passive fires bolts four times as fast.

synergys.name: Redeemer (Rhaast)
synergys.description: For each non-unique trait you have active, your team gains 2%/3%/4% Attack Speed, and 2/3/4 Armor and Magic Resist.

champions.description: ?: ? time ? attacks, ? strikes a nearby enemy, dealing ? ? magic damage. ? an enemy is struck ? times by ?, ? strikes them again. ?: ? launches ? empowered strikes, dealing ? ? magic damage instead.

champions.name: Zed
champions.description: ? a clone behind the target with ?% reduced max ? and ? increased ? cost. ? clone inherits its creator's items, stats, and current ?, and can cast ?.

items.name: Drone Uplink
texts: A drone repeats 25% of damage from the holder's attacks and Abilities to the same targets every 3 seconds.
At (4): If the holder is Psionic, gain an additional mini-drone that repeats 20% of damage.
Set.17.items.recommended Sona, Viktor

items.name: Malware Matrix
texts: Dealing physical damage to an enemy reduces the target's Armor by 2.
At (4): If the holder is Psionic, every 3rd attack cleaves, dealing 75 physical damage to nearby enemies.
Set.17.items.recommended Master Yi, Pyke

items.name: Biomatter Preserver
texts: Gain 5% max Health and deploy 3 Life Orbs. Every 5 seconds of combat, one drops restoring 18% of the holder's missing Health.
At (4): If the holder is Psionic, they gain 22% increased healing from all sources.
Set.17.items.recommended Gragas

items.name: Sympathetic Implant
texts: Every 5 seconds, gain 1 additional Mana Per Second.
At (4): If the holder is Psionic, their abilities deal 20% of their ability damage as true damage instead.
Set.17.items.recommended Sona, Viktor

items.name: Target-Lock Optics
texts: The holder's first attack on each enemy deals 150 additional damage.
At (4): If the holder is Psionic, they heal 12% of their max Health whenever their target dies.
Set.17.items.recommended Pyke, Master Yi

items.name: Command Mod: Exhaust
texts: Command a unit's attacks to Burn, Wound, and Chill.

items.name: Command Mod: Doublestrike
texts: Command a unit to have a 25% chance to attack twice when attacking.

items.name: Command Mod: Analyze
texts: Command a unit to grant you 1 XP every 3 seconds it is alive during player combat.

items.name: Command Mod: Brace
texts: Command a unit to gain a 20% Health shield for 8 seconds at the start of combat.

items.name: Command Mod: Transmute
texts: Command a unit to drop 2 gold each time it kills an enemy during player combat.

items.name: Command Mod: Disrupt
texts: Command a unit to Stun enemies within 3 hexes for 1 second when it dies.

items.name: Command Mod: Optimize
texts: Command a unit to reduce their mana cost by 15%.

items.name: Command Mod: Fabricate
texts: Command a unit to gain a temporary recommended item at the start of combat.

items.name: Emblem
items.description: Items that grant a unit an additional trait. Crafted using a Spatula and a component.

items.name: Dark Star Emblem
texts: The holder gains the Dark Star trait.

items.name: Timebreaker Emblem
texts: The holder gains the Timebreaker trait.

items.name: Stargazer Emblem
texts: The holder gains the Stargazer trait.

items.name: Space Groove Emblem
texts: The holder gains the Space Groove trait.

items.name: Meeple Emblem
texts: The holder gains the Meeple trait.

texts: The holder gains the Arbiter trait.

texts: The holder gains the Primordian trait.

items.name: N.O.V.A. Emblem
texts: The holder gains the N.O.V.A. trait.

items.name: Marauder Emblem
texts: The holder gains the Marauder trait.

items.name: Challenger Emblem
texts: The holder gains the Challenger trait.

items.name: Voyager Emblem
texts: The holder gains the Voyager trait.

items.name: Shepherd Emblem
texts: The holder gains the Shepherd trait.

items.name: Bastion Emblem
texts: The holder gains the Bastion trait.

items.name: Vanguard Emblem
texts: The holder gains the Vanguard trait.

items.name: Brawler Emblem
texts: The holder gains the Brawler trait.

items.name: Rogue Emblem
texts: The holder gains the Rogue trait.

items.name: Anima Emblem
texts: The holder gains the Anima trait.

items.name: Sniper Emblem

augments.name: Poppy Hero
augments.description: Gain a Poppy. Poppy becomes a ranged Marksman and her attacks Meeps at her target.

augments.name: Aatrox Hero
augments.description: Aatrox's spell is now a low-mana three-hit combo that heals him for a portion of the damage dealt. When his NOVA move happens, he gains maximum health and size.

augments.name: Bonk!
augments.description: Gain a Nasus. Your strongest Nasus becomes an Attack Fighter with a single target ability that gets stronger with each kill.

augments.name: Charge Transfer I
augments.description: Your team gains 5% Damage Amp. 50% of overkill damage is dealt to the nearest enemy.

augments.name: The Tower
augments.description: Gain a massive Training Dummy that zaps nearby enemies

augments.name: Group Hug I
augments.description: Combat start: Allies grant other adjacent allies 6 Armor and Magic Resist. This effect stacks.

augments.name: Expedition
augments.description: At the start of planning phase, lose the right-most champion on your bench. After losing 33 gold of units this way, gain a powerful reward.

augments.name: Forge a Friend
augments.description: The next 1-cost champion you purchase is 3-star.

augments.name: Size Matters
augments.description: Gain a Giant's Belt. After a champion begins combat with more than 3800 max Health, gain another.

augments.name: Feeling Lucky
augments.description: Gain 12 gold, then flip a coin. If heads, gain 3 more gold.

augments.name: Cognitive Tax
augments.description: Gain 8 gold and 1 XP.

augments.name: Cognitive Tax+
augments.description: Gain 12 gold and 3 XP.

augments.name: Kick Start
augments.description: Gain a random 2-star 2-cost champion and 1 gold.

augments.name: Anima Commander
augments.description: Gain a Briar, a Jinx, and an Illaoi. Increase your current and max player Health by 10.

augments.name: Sniper's Nest
augments.description: Snipers gain 8% Damage Amp for each combat fought from the same starting hex, up to 32%. Gain an Ezreal and a Gnar.

augments.name: May the Fours Be With You
augments.description: Your 4 cost champions and Jhin gain 204 Health and 14% Attack Speed. Gain a Jhin.

augments.name: Invader Zed
augments.description: Gain a Bloodthirster. On Stage 4-1, gain a Zed. After receiving Zed, he can then appear in your shops. Zed is a 5-cost Attack Fighter that creates clones of himself.

augments.name: Reach For the Stars
augments.description: Jax gains stacking attack speed with every attack. On cast, jump to a nearby enemy, dealing damage and adding stacking on-hit damage for the rest of combat.

augments.name: Meep Space 9
augments.description: Meepsie gains a weaker version of Brock's spell and heavy attack damage.

augments.name: Star Conqueror
augments.description: Mordekaiser becomes an auto-attack based AP carry, whose channel is a burst of attack speed for as long as he has mana to spend. At combat start and on kill, he gains a non-mana-locking shield.

augments.name: Self Destruct
augments.description: Gain a Gragas. Gragas now self detonates, sacrificing 20% of max Health to deal XXX (AP) plus the sacrificed Health as magic damage in a four hex radius, reduced by 20% per hex from the epicenter.

augments.name: Contract Killer
augments.description: Gain a Pyke. Your strongest Pyke gains a resetting ability and generates gold on takedown.

augments.name: Side Effects
augments.description: When an ally is healed, they deal 50% of the healing to their target as magic damage. Every 5 seconds, allies heal for 5% of their max Health.

augments.name: Misfits
augments.description: Your team gains 75 Health for each active Unique trait. Gain a Miss Fortune and a Rhaast.

augments.name: Booster Pack
augments.description: Gain 11 gold worth of random champions. (At least one 3-Cost guaranteed!)

augments.name: Booster Pack+
augments.description: Gain 18 gold worth of random champions. (At least one 4-Cost guaranteed!)

augments.name: Booster Pack++
augments.description: Gain 30 gold worth of random champions. (At least one 5-Cost guaranteed!)

augments.name: Charge Transfer II
augments.description: Your team gains 8% Damage Amp. 80% of overkill damage is dealt to the nearest enemy.

augments.name: Group Hug II
augments.description: Combat start: Allies grant other adjacent allies 9 Armor and Magic Resist. This effect stacks.

augments.name: Frontline Foundation
augments.description: Gain a 2-star 1-cost Tank champion and an emblem for their last-listed trait.

augments.name: Kahunahuna
augments.description: Every 5th attack deals bonus true damage equal to 200% Basic Attack Damage.

augments.name: Cosmic Restart
augments.description: Call upon the Gods to sell all units on your board and bench. Gain 2 random Emblems and 10 free Shop rerolls.

augments.name: Cognitive Overload
augments.description: Gain 7 Gold, 1 2-star 1-cost champion, 1 2-cost champion, 2 3-cost champions, 1 XP, and 1 Shop reroll.

augments.name: Backline Blueprint
augments.description: Gain a 3-cost non-Tank champion and an emblem for their last-listed trait.

augments.name: Money Hungry
augments.description: Gain 10 gold now, then 7 gold at the start of every stage. Picking up gold makes your Tactician larger.

augments.name: Five-Pointed Star
augments.description: At the start of each stage, the first champion you buy from a specific tier is 2-star. Gain a 2-star 1-cost champion and 2 gold now. Stage 2: 2-cost Stage 3: 3-cost Stage 4: 4-cost Stage 5: 5-cost

augments.name: Just Hit
augments.description: Gain a Champion Duplicator, 18 Shop rerolls, and 10 gold.

augments.name: Golden Gamble
augments.description: Flip a coin. If heads, gain a Radiant Lucky Item Chest. If tails, gain a random Radiant item and a Reforger.

augments.name: Baron's Lair
augments.description: Gain a Tank item. After 8 seconds of combat, your team gains 5% Attack Damage and Ability Power every second for the rest of combat.
